exercises.title: SDN Controller Simulator
exercises.description: Build a basic SDN controller for quantum networks.
exercises.expectedOutput: Basic SDN controller for quantum network
hints: Store elements in dictionary by ID

exercises.title: Hybrid Service Orchestrator
exercises.description: Orchestrate services using both quantum and classical networks.
tasks: Provision quantum path via quantum controller
Provision classical path for control traffic
Coordinate both paths for unified service
hints: Services have both quantum and classical needs
Service succeeds only if both paths work

exercises.title: Control Plane Latency Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze impact of control plane latency on quantum operations.
hints: Control RTT adds to operation time
Some operations too fast for remote control

exercises.title: Integrated QKD Service
exercises.description: Build complete QKD service using hybrid architecture.
tasks: Set up quantum path for key generation
Set up classical path for sifting/EC/PA
Report key rate and service quality
hints: QKD needs both quantum and classical
Both must work for successful key
